1057.issue: [E1057] js-controller 5.0.19 listed as dependency but 6.0.11 is required as minimum. Please update dependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.owfs/blob/master/io-package.json).

1087.issue: [W1087] "common.materialize" replaced by property "common.adminUI.config" at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.owfs/blob/master/io-package.json). Please remove.

1090.issue: [E1090] admin dependency missing. admin 7.6.17 is required as minimum, 7.6.20 is recommended. Please add to globalDependencies at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.owfs/blob/master/io-package.json).

2004.issue: [E2004] Versions "0.6.3, 0.6.2" listed at common.news at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.owfs/blob/master/io-package.json) do not exist at [NPM](https://www.npmjs.com/package/iobroker.owfs). Please remove from news section.

3009.issue: [W3009] Workflow "test-and-release.yml" is missing recommended concurrency configuration. See "https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.example/blob/e7db900495bb3c2b89dc35d863dda4ccf33f5def/JavaScript/.github/workflows/test-and-release.yml#L17" for details.

3013.issue: [W3013] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "check-and-lint" should contain a step using "ioBroker/testing-action-check@v1".

3015.issue: [W3015] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" should contain a step using "ioBroker/testing-action-adapter@v1".

3017.issue: [W3017] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" should contain a step using "ioBroker/testing-action-deploy@v1".

4036.issue: [S4036] Consider adding .vscode/settings.json file with JSON schema definitions for better development experience with Visual Studio Code.

5022.issue: [S5022] Please consider migrating to admin 5 UI (jsonConfig) or react based UI.

5033.issue: [W5033] method "deleteState()" is deprecated and will be removed with future js-controller version. Please use "set/deleteObject()" instead.

5046.issue: [E5046] Using admin/jsonConfig.json(5) requires common.adminUI to be set to "common.adminUI": { "config": "json" }.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process issue [[#152] "Migration to ESLint 9 and @iobroker/eslint-config"](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.owfs/issues/152)

8906.issue: [S8906] Some Dependabot entries ("github-actions") use "schedule: interval: monthly". Consider migrating to random cron schedule ("schedule: interval: cron") for load distribution.

8913.issue: [S8913] No automerge workflow for dependabot PRs found. Consider setting up automerging by adding ".github/workflows/automerge-dependabot.yml".

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

9006.issue: [S9006] .commitinfo file should be excluded by .gitignore, please add a line with text ".commitinfo" to .gitignore

0033.issue: [E0033] @iobroker/adapter-core 3.1.6 specified. 3.2.3 is required as minimum, 3.3.2 (or newer) is current. Please update dependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.owfs/blob/master/package.json)

0036.issue: [E0036] @iobroker/testing 4.1.3 specified. 5.2.2 is required as minimum,  5.2.2 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.owfs/blob/master/package.json)

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 20 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '18' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.owfs/blob/master/package.json).
